g.text: D5 - STRIDE Threat Model | gap-genai-discovery | 12 H/M threats on the DFD

text.tspan: I=Info disclosure D=Denial of service E=Elevation of privilege

g.text: STRIDE threats (H = red, M = orange, OPEN = grey)

text.tspan: H - tighten IAP audience, enforce hd=gap.com
T2 (T) Prompt injection in retrieved doc
T3 (I) PII in queries logged to BQ
H - redact pre-log, BQ column-level ACL
T5 (I) Cross-session leakage in VAIS sessions
T6 (T) Index poisoning via Confluence edit
M - sidecar review + diff alert on reindex
T7 (E) PAT used by wrong SA
T9 (T) Malicious npm/pypi dep in build
M - sink to BQ with retention lock + CMEK
T11 (E) Unconstrained execute_sql via managed MCP
M - IAM deny policy on roles/mcp.toolWriteUser;
sa-agent dataViewer ONLY on view v_experiment_kpis
(raw tables hidden); Model Armor inspects payloads
OPEN Q24 - PSEC to decide internal-only
T13 (D) LLM token-cost spike via prompt loops / runaway agent
M - Cloud Billing budget alert + Monitoring alert on llm_tokens_out rate
